feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Residue
entry.summary:
Author: batoutofhale (galaxystiel)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,998Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Stiles has seen a lot of blood over the years in Beacon Hills. Most of it stops meaning anything after a while. Just another consequence of living in a town that refuses to stay normal.

entry.title: Same But Different
entry.summary:
Author: Reiko009

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,466Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 99

Summary: “Let me help, love.” Peter pulled away, which made Derek almost whimper at the loss of contact. The new pet name was only used when they were alone like this. Somehow the word was both too weak to describe what their coupling actually meant and a far more intimate endearment than what Derek felt that he deserved. What they were doing wasn’t love so much as need. He could sense his wolf curling protectively around what belonged to him, what anchored him, and what strengthened him as the Alpha. True, his pack was small: just him and Peter. But that was enough – for now. A spicey reimagining of Season 2. Old foes and a new threat emerge, all while the Hale wolves begin to fall for a very human high schooler with deep brown eyes and a loud mouth. Expect a lot of familiar plot points from the canon, just with a twist. Mostly an excuse to write uncle/nephew werewolf smut.

entry.title: Wayward Instinct
entry.summary:
Author: olimakiella

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,773Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 18

Summary: In a surveillance-heavy, interstellar system, controlled by the Sentinel Authority Network (the SAN, known colloquially as ‘Verse Authorities, or simply the VA), a small, easily overlooked smuggling ship survives on discretion, precision, and trust. By staying invisible. Its captain, Derek Hale, runs jobs under the radar with a crew built on trust, skill, and shared history. The ship’s success is not luck.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Stiles and his seven wolves
entry.summary:
Author: Luciusnguyen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,811Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 96

Summary: At the age of 11, Stiles discovered that he could talk to animals! And then things just escalated from there. Okay, so I rewatched Snow White and the Seven Dwarves recently and then I thought, what if Stiles could talk to animals? Like an Animal Whisperer? What would happen if Stiles could do that and how the story would be different if Stiles had power from the beginning? And then I did some research and holy cow, I found something very interesting in Poland's folklore. Thus, I used it in my story, I hope you guys like it. P/s: I’m really, really bad at writing summaries :(

entry.title: Beacon Hills, a Beacon for Bullshit
entry.summary:
Author: Thymos_2000

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,206Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 50

Summary: Instead of moving to Linora, the Byers and Eleven move to beacon hills. Meanwhile the pack has to deal with split bonds, a new weird family, secrets between each other, trauma, and the two hunters pretending to be cops and their weird friend.

entry.title: He Was My Consequence
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,234Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Nerdy, shy Stiles—always buried in books and mocked for it—crosses the wrong line when she exposes campus bad boy Derek after a brutal fight. Suspended because of her, he comes back with one goal: make her life miserable. But when he catches her alone in the restricted library, secretly reading erotic novels—that’s when everything shifts. Teasing, humiliating, pushing her boundaries… until hate and tension blur into something neither of them can control, and the girl he hated becomes the one he can’t stop wanting.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,092,030Chapters: 55/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,107Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 64

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 149,261Chapters: 13/14Kudos: 19

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: Nothing Like Losing a Limb
entry.summary:
Author: ash_mcj

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,809Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 1,151

Summary: “I’m okay,” Derek said, but it sounded just as much like a lie as it felt. “I mean…not really, but y’know. My control is shit, and not having Stiles around doesn’t help.” “I’m sure he’s taking it hard, too,” Paige told him gently—and she had no idea how right she was. Stiles was having some serious issues, and the fiasco from that morning at the hospital was still weighing heavy on Derek’s mind. “I always heard losing a member of your pack is like losing a limb, but it’s not. It’s…more like I’m the limb, and I’ve lost the body.” - Once the smoke dissipated after the tragedy at Hale Manor, the surviving members of the pack were scattered like ash in the wind. They might have escaped the flames that night—but none of them came out unscathed. [or: derek self-destructs, allison finds strength in the other side of her bloodline, cora and malia learn to survive in treacherous conditions, jackson attempts to function without his other half, and the stilinskis develop a habit of picking up strays—but who could really blame them?]

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,111Chapters: 41/42Kudos: 137

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: If You Ever Did Believe
entry.summary:
Author: writteninthewolfstar

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 155,807Chapters: 10/16Kudos: 593

Summary: When the Sheriff finds out about werewolves after the showdown with Gerard, he ships Stiles off to his great aunt’s in Cape Cod for the summer. Stiles is not looking forward to it… until he learns the family secret.

entry.title: A Kiss with no End ? ( Os)
entry.summary:
Author: Bloodlypup32

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,560Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 16

Summary: This will be a training with a lot lof One shots.The first time i wrote about Stiles and Derek. In the End you will be rewarded with love .,.Have fun and i sill try to ad smut in the future. I recommend read the notes. And here is a small look in on what cou could Expect: He caged Stiles in slowly and came closer till there Bodys almost touched. With every breath there both took, the other one could feel it on there face like a ghost. „Im going to do something now and i want you to push me away if it is to much and even punch me if i read the lines wrong,but i need to do this now to just…know“He breathed against my lips and switched with his eyes up and down.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,756Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: A truth so loud I can no longer ignore, My youth.
entry.summary:
Author: winters_child30

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,525Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Set after the neon light party where Caitlin asks Stiles the damned question on whether he likes boys which send him spiraling where he realises maybe he isn't as straight as he thought all thanks to some help from a not so friendly neighborhood werewolf.
